constructors.name: Layer
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Layer class

methods.name: ClearId
methods.summary: Resets the HasId property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearIndex
methods.summary: Resets the HasIndex property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearName
methods.summary: Resets the HasName property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: CopyAttributesFrom
methods.summary: Copy typical attributes from another layer

methods.name: DataCRC
methods.summary: Increments the Cyclic Redundancy Check value by this instance.

methods.name: Default
methods.summary: Sets layer to default settings.

methods.name: DeleteModelVisible
methods.summary: Remove any model visibility setting so the layer's global setting will be used for all viewports.

methods.name: DeletePerViewportColor
methods.summary: Remove any per viewport layer color setting so the layer's overall setting will be used for all viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting for this viewport will be deleted. If Guid.Empty, the all per viewport layer color settings will be removed.

methods.name: DeletePerViewportPlotColor
methods.summary: Remove any per viewport layer plot color setting so the layer's overall setting will be used for all viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting for this viewport will be deleted. If Guid.Empty, the all per viewport layer color settings will be removed.

methods.name: DeletePerViewportPlotWeight
methods.summary: Remove any per viewport layer plot weight setting so the layer's overall setting will be used for all viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting for this viewport will be deleted. If Guid.Empty, the all per viewport layer color settings will be removed.

methods.name: DeletePerViewportSettings
methods.summary: Deletes per viewport layer settings.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the settings for that viewport are deleted. If Guid.Empty, then all per viewport settings are deleted.

methods.name: DeletePerViewportVisible
methods.summary: Remove any per viewport visibility setting so the layer's overall setting will be used for all viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting for this viewport will be deleted. If Guid.Empty, the all per viewport visibility settings will be removed.

methods.name: DeletePlotColor
methods.summary: Removes the plot color for layer. The layer's color will be used for the plot color.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.Equals(Object).)

methods.name: GetChildren()
methods.summary: Gets immediate children of this layer. Note that child layers may have their own children.

returns.doc: Array of child layers, sorted by layer index, or null if this layer does not have any children.

methods.name: GetChildren(Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the children of this layer.

params.name: allChildren
params.doc: If false, the immediate children are returned. If true, immediate children, their children, and so on, are returned.

returns.doc: Array of child layers, sorted by layer index, or null if this layer does not have any children.

methods.name: GetCustomSectionStyle
methods.summary: Get an optional custom section style associated with these attributes.

methods.name: GetDefaultLayerProperties
methods.summary: Constructs a layer with the current default properties. The default layer properties are: color = Rhino.ApplicationSettings.AppearanceSettings.DefaultLayerColorline style = Rhino.ApplicationSettings.AppearanceSettings.DefaultLayerLineStylematerial index = -1IGES level = -1mode = NormalLayername = emptylayer index = 0 (ignored by AddLayer)

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.GetHashCode().)

methods.name: GetLeafName(Layer)
methods.summary: Get a layer name's "leaf" level name

returns.doc: leaf name or String.Empty if fullPath does not contain a leaf

methods.name: GetLeafName(String)
methods.summary: Get a layer name's "leaf" level name

returns.doc: leaf name or String.Empty if fullPath does not contain a leaf

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: GetParentName(Layer)
methods.summary: Get a layer's "parent" path name

methods.name: GetParentName(String)
methods.summary: Get a layer's "parent" path name

methods.name: GetPersistentLocking
methods.summary: The persistent locking setting is used for layers that can be locked by a "parent" object. A common case is when a layer is a child layer (Layer.ParentI is not nil). In this case, when a parent layer is locked, then child layers are also locked. The persistent locking setting determines what happens when the parent is unlocked again.

methods.name: GetPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: The global persistent visibility setting is used for layers whose visibility can be changed by a "parent" object. A common case is when a layer is a child layer (ParentId is not nil). In this case, when a parent layer is turned off, then child layers are also turned off. The persistent visibility setting determines what happens when the parent is turned on again.
methods.remarks: Returns true if this layer's visibility is controlled by a parent object and the parent is turned on (after being off), then this layer will also be turned on. Returns false if this layer's visibility is controlled by a parent object and the parent layer is turned on (after being off), then this layer will continue to be off. When the persistent viability is not explicitly set, this property returns the current value of IsVisible

methods.name: GetUserString
methods.summary: Gets user string from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve the string.

returns.doc: string associated with the key if successful. null if no key was found.

methods.name: GetUserStrings
methods.summary: Gets a copy of all (user key string, user value string) pairs attached to this geometry.

methods.name: HasPerViewportSettings
methods.summary: Verifies that a layer has per viewport settings.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then checks for settings for that specific viewport. If Guid.Empty, then checks for any viewport settings.

returns.doc: True if the layer has per viewport settings, false otherwise.

methods.name: HasSelectedObjects
methods.summary: Returns true if the layer has one or more selected Rhino objects.

params.name: checkSubObjects
params.doc: If true, the search will include objects that have some subset of the object selected, like some edges of a Brep. If false, objects where the entire object is not selected are ignored.

returns.doc: true if the layer has selected Rhino objects, false otherwise.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: LockId
methods.summary: Locks the component Id property.

methods.name: LockIndex
methods.summary: Locks the component Index property.

methods.name: LockName
methods.summary: Locks the component Name property.

methods.name: ParentLayer
methods.summary: Returns parent of a layer.

params.name: rootLevelParent
params.doc: If true, the root level parent is returned. The root level parent never has a parent. If false, the immediate parent is returned. The immediate parent may have a parent.

returns.doc: The parent layer, or null if the layer does not have a parent.

methods.name: PerViewportColor
methods.summary: Gets the display color for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

methods.name: PerViewportIsVisible
methods.summary: Gets the per viewport visibility of this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the visibility setting for that viewport is returned. If Guid.Empty, the IsVisible property is returned.

returns.doc: Returns true if objects on layer are visible.

methods.name: PerViewportPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: Gets the per layer persistent visibility. The persistent viability setting is used for layers whose visibility can be changed by a parent layer. In this case, when a parent layer is turned off, then child layers are also turned off. The persistent visibility setting determines what happens when the parent is turned on again.

returns.doc: Return true if this layer's visibility in the specified viewport is controlled by a parent object and the parent is turned on (after being off), then this layer will also be turned on in the specified viewport. Returns false if this layer's visibility in the specified viewport is controlled by a parent object and the parent layer is turned on(after being off), then this layer will continue to be off in the specified viewport.

methods.name: PerViewportPlotColor
methods.summary: Gets the plot color for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

methods.name: PerViewportPlotWeight
methods.summary: Gets the plot weight, in millimeters, for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

methods.name: SetPersistentLocking
methods.summary: Set the persistent locking setting for this layer

methods.name: SetPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: Set the global persistent visibility setting for this layer.

methods.name: SetPerViewportColor
methods.signature: public void SetPerViewportColor(Guid viewportId, Color color)
methods.summary: Sets the display color for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

methods.name: SetPerViewportPersistentVisibility
methods.signature: public void SetPerViewportPersistentVisibility(Guid viewportId, bool persistentVisibility)
methods.summary: Sets the per layer persistent visibility. The persistent viability setting is used for layers whose visibility can be changed by a parent layer. In this case, when a parent layer is turned off, then child layers are also turned off. The persistent visibility setting determines what happens when the parent is turned on again.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id. If Guid.Empty, then the setting applies to all viewports with per viewport layer settings.

params.name: persistentVisibility
params.doc: If true, this layer's visibility in the specified viewport is controlled by a parent object and the parent is turned on (after being off), then this layer will also be turned on in the specified viewport. If false, this layer's visibility in the specified viewport is controlled by a parent object and the parent layer is turned on (after being off), then this layer will continue to be off in the specified viewport.

methods.name: SetPerViewportPlotColor
methods.signature: public void SetPerViewportPlotColor(Guid viewportId, Color color)
methods.summary: Sets the plot color for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

methods.name: SetPerViewportPlotWeight
methods.signature: public void SetPerViewportPlotWeight(Guid viewportId, double plotWeight)
methods.summary: Sets the plot weight, in millimeters, for this layer.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id.

params.name: plotWeight
params.doc: The plot weight in millimeters. A weight of 0.0 indicates the "default" pen weight should be used. A weight of -1.0 indicates the layer should not be printed.

methods.name: SetPerViewportVisible
methods.signature: public void SetPerViewportVisible(Guid viewportId, bool visible)
methods.summary: Controls layer visibility in specific viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting applies only to the viewport with the specified id. If Guid.Empty, then the setting applies to all viewports with per viewport layer settings.

params.name: visible
params.doc: true to make layer visible, false to make layer invisible.

methods.name: SetUserString
methods.signature: public bool SetUserString(string key, string value)
methods.summary: Attach a user string (key,value combination) to this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve this string.

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: (Overrides ModelComponent.ToString().)

methods.name: UnsetModelPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: Remove any model persistent visibility setting from this layer.

methods.name: UnsetPersistentLocking
methods.summary: Remove any explicitly persistent locking settings from this layer

methods.name: UnsetPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: Remove any explicit persistent visibility setting from this layer

methods.name: UnsetPerViewportPersistentVisibility
methods.summary: Remove any per viewport persistent visibility setting so the layer's overall setting will be used for all viewports.

params.name: viewportId
params.doc: If not Guid.Empty, then the setting for this viewport will be deleted. If Guid.Empty, the all per viewport visibility settings will be removed.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Layer left, Layer right)

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Layer left, Layer right)

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: Gets or sets the display color for this layer.

properties.name: ComponentStatus
properties.summary: Gets or sets the status of the layer.

properties.name: ComponentType
properties.summary: Returns Layer.

properties.name: DeletedName
properties.summary: Gets the name of a component that is deleted.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: FullPath
properties.summary: Gets the full path to this layer. The full path includes nesting information.

properties.name: HasId
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an ID.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an Index.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has a Name.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ID of this layer object. You typically do not need to assign a custom ID.

properties.name: IdIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component ID is already locked.

properties.name: IgesLevel
properties.summary: Gets or sets the IGES level for this layer.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model component index attribute.

properties.name: IndexIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Index is already locked.

properties.name: InstanceDefinitionModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model as part of the information required for a linked instance definition, this value identifies the linked instance definition reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: IsComponentStatusLocked
properties.summary: The component status itself can be locked. This returns an indication.

properties.name: IsCurrent
properties.summary: Returns true if the layer is the current layer.

properties.name: IsDeleted
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this layer has been deleted and is currently in the Undo buffer.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsExpanded
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this layer is expanded in the Rhino Layer dialog.

properties.name: IsLocked
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the locked state of this layer.

properties.name: IsReference
properties.summary: Gets a value indicting whether this layer is a referenced layer. Referenced layers are part of referenced documents.

properties.name: IsReferenceParentLayer
properties.summary: Returns true if the layer is a parent layer of the layer tree from a linked instance definition or the layer tree from a worksession reference model.

properties.name: IsSystemComponent
properties.summary: True if this model component is a system constant. An incomplete list of system constant model components is below:ON_ModelComponent::Unset ON_InstanceDefinition::Empty ON_Linetype::UnsetON_Linetype::ContinuousON_Linetype::ByLayerON_Linetype::ByParent ON_Layer::UnsetON_Layer::Default ON_TextStyle::UnsetON_TextStyle::DefaultON_TextStyle::ByLayerON_TextStyle::ByParent ON_DimStyle::UnsetON_DimStyle::DefaultON_DimStyle::DefaultInchDecimalON_DimStyle::DefaultInchFractionalON_DimStyle::DefaultFootInchArchitectureON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterSmallON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterLargeON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterArchitecture

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: IsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the global visibility of this layer.

properties.name: IsVisibleInUserInterface
properties.summary: Return true if the layer is visible in user interfaces that display layers. Returns false if the layer not visible in user interfaces. This is a runtime property that does not persist in .3dm files. This property is also used by the Layers panel to filter layers.

properties.name: LinetypeIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the line-type index for this layer.

properties.name: ModelIsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model visiblity of this layer.

properties.name: ModelPersistentVisibility
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model persistent visibility of this layer. The persistent viability setting is used for layers whose visibility can be changed by a parent layer. In this case, when a parent layer is turned off, then child layers are also turned off. The persistent visibility setting determines what happens when the parent is turned on again.

properties.name: ModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: A value identifying the model that manages this component.
properties.remarks: If the component is being managed by a model, this value identifies the model. In Rhino, this value is the document runtime serial number. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of this layer.

properties.name: NameIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Name is already locked.

properties.name: ParentLayerId
properties.summary: Gets the ID of the parent layer. Layers can be organized in a hierarchical structure, in which case this returns the parent layer ID. If the layer has no parent, Guid.Empty will be returned.

properties.name: PersistentVisibility
properties.summary: Gets or sets the global persistent visibility setting for this layer.

properties.name: PerViewportIsVisibleInNewDetails
properties.summary: Gets and sets the initial per viewport visibility of this layer in newly created detail views.

properties.name: PlotColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the plot color for this layer.

properties.name: PlotWeight
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weight of the plotting pen in millimeters. A weight of 0.0 indicates the "default" pen weight should be used. A weight of -1.0 indicates the layer should not be printed.

properties.name: ReferenceModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model for reference, this value identifies the reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: RenderMaterial
properties.summary: Gets or sets the RenderMaterial for objects on this layer that have MaterialSource() == MaterialFromLayer. A null result indicates that no RenderMaterial has been assigned and the material created by the default Material constructor or the RenderMaterialIndex should be used.

properties.name: RenderMaterialIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the index of render material for objects on this layer that have MaterialSource() == MaterialFromLayer. A material index of -1 indicates no material has been assigned and the material created by the default Material constructor should be used.

properties.name: SortIndex
properties.summary: Runtime index used to sort layers in layer dialog.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UserStringCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of user strings.
